comparisons.detail: AArch64 ET_REL, exact imports and aliases, target vermagic and reproducible build
14/14 function inventory and per-function call multiplicity match
8/8 indirect callback type IDs match; six direct functions documented as not applicable
13/14 functions are opcode-exact; 14/14 have matching relocations, sections and symbol sizes; the remaining bounds guard is accepted only after a validated dominator proof
registry, callbacks, battery resistance edge cases, design capacity, boot mode, GPIO lookup and lifecycle covered twice
36 callback nodes, 16 GPIO slots and both nine-entry battery tables reconstructed

justified_differences.justification: candidate targets the connected kernel and Module.symvers recorded in engenharia/config/target_kernel.json
runtime ELF/KMI surfaces are audited independently; file size equality is not an ABI requirement

justified_differences.difference: zte_misc_probe encodes the redundant second GPIO bounds guard as idx > 15 instead of idx == 16
justified_differences.justification: the preceding identical unsigned object-size guard proves idx <= 15 on every reachable state and both branches target the same trap; see assembly_comparison_final.json
